zh.lifeSummary: 當Cornelis Jans van Aefferen於1455年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德米德爾可普時，他的父親Jan Pietersz van Afferden35歲，母親Esther IJsendaal31歲。他於1479年與Adriana Maria Broos在荷蘭霍蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1516年在荷蘭-拉藍德吉爾福利特享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cornelis Jans van Aefferen于1455年出生在荷兰-拉藍德米德爾可普时，他的父亲Jan Pietersz van Afferden35岁，母亲Esther IJsendaal31岁。他于1479年与Adriana Maria Broos在荷兰霍蘭结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1516年在荷兰-拉藍德吉爾福利特享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Cornelis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an old Roman family name, Cornélius, which is of uncertain origin, possibly a derivative of Latin cornu ‘horn’. This was the name of a 3rd-century pope who is venerated as a saint. The name was particularly popular in the Low Countries, and immigrants contributed to its frequency in the north of England from the 1400s. However, it is now seldom used in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Jans
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Janice .  It was quite popular in the United States in the 1960s and 70s by association with the rock singer  Janis Joplin  (  1943–70 ).

variants.name: Janice
meanings: Derivative of Jane , with the addition of the suffix -ice, abstracted from girls' names such as Candice and Bernice . It seems to have been first used as the name of the heroine of the novel Janice Meredith by Paul Leicester Ford , published in 1899 .

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

Beginning of the rule of the Austrian Habsburgs.
The Netherlands is inherited by the future Habsburg Emperor and King of Spain Charles V.
The Catholic King Charles I of Spain ruled the Netherlands.

en.lifeSummary: When Cornelis Jans van Aefferen was born in 1455, in Middelkoop, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Jan Pietersz van Afferden, was 35 and his mother, Esther IJsendaal, was 31. He married Adriana Maria Broos in 1479, in Holland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1516, in Geervliet, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cornelis Jans van Aefferen est né en 1455, à Middelkoop, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Jan Pietersz van Afferden, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Esther IJsendaal, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Adriana Maria Broos en 1479, à Holland, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1516, à Geervliet, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cornelis Jans van Aefferen 1455 in Middelkoop, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jan Pietersz van Afferden 35 und seine Mutter Esther IJsendaal 31. Er hat 1479 in Holland, Niederlande Adriana Maria Broos geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1516 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Geervliet, Südholland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cornelis Jans van Aefferen è nato il nel 1455 nel Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Jan Pietersz van Afferden, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Esther IJsendaal, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Adriana Maria Broos nel 1479, nel Holland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1516, nel Geervliet, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cornelis Jans van Aefferenが1455年にオランダズイド-hオランドミッドエルコオップで生まれた時，父Jan Pietersz van Afferdenは35歳，母Esther IJsendaalは31歳であった。1479年にオランダホーランドでAdriana Maria Broosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1516年にオランダズイド-hオランドジェエルvリートで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cornelis Jans van Aefferen(이)가 1455년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 미델코프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jan Pietersz van Afferden(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Esther IJsendaal(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1479년 네덜란드 홀랜드에서 Adriana Maria Broos(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1516년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 그이르블리트에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cornelis Jans van Aefferen nasceu em 1455, em Middelkoop, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Jan Pietersz van Afferden, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Esther IJsendaal, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Adriana Maria Broos em 1479, em Holland, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1516, em Geervliet, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cornelis Jans van Aefferen родился в 1455 г. в местности мидделкуп, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Jan Pietersz van Afferden было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Esther IJsendaal, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Adriana Maria Broos в 1479 г. в местности холланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1516 г. в местности джирвльет, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 61 год.

Se casó con Adriana Maria Broos en 1479, en Holland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1516, en Geervliet, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 61 años.
